nasb.text: Paul, an apostle (not sent from men nor through the agency of man, but through Jesus Christ and God the Father, who raised Him from the dead),

esv.text: Paul, an apostle—not from men nor through man, but through Jesus Christ and God the Father, who raised him from the dead—

ccb.text: 我是保罗，我做使徒并非受人委派，也不是倚靠人，而是由耶稣基督和叫祂从死里复活的父上帝委派的。

csbs.text: 我保罗做使徒，既不是出于人，也不是藉着人，而是藉着耶稣基督和使他从死人中复活的父神；
